problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
